title: Flatter Entities
body:
This mod makes living entities render 2 dimensional. Inspired by the "MineCraft 3D Shareware v1.34", Mojang's 2019 April Fools' joke This mod is a continuation of [**Flat Entities**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flat-entities "Flat Entities Curseforge page") which is under the GNU GPL 3.0 license and was discontinued mid 2019. This version comes with a client config in which you can - Blacklist entities (Blacklist entities from rendering 2d) - Blacklist dimensions (Blacklist entities from rendering 2d in configured dimensions or invert the blacklist to make that blacklist into a whitelist) - Whitelist entities to render 2d in blacklisted dimensions [![Youtube Video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/WXN8sEGlK2A/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/WXN8sEGlK2A)

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
